Claude vs ChatGPT

If you run a small business,
Claude is the right AI.

Stop evaluating. We've implemented both across dozens of businesses. Claude wins for SMB — and we'll prove it by setting it up for you.

Get Claude Set Up → Our Services
The real problem

It's not which tool.
It's that neither one is working.

🔄
Analysis paralysis
You've read the comparisons. You still don't know which to commit to — so you're using neither seriously.
⏱️
Time wasted evaluating
Hours testing both tools on toy examples rather than building workflows that change how your team operates.
😶
Tried both, neither transformative
You've used them. They helped a bit. But they haven't changed how your business runs. That's a setup problem, not a tool problem.
🧑‍💻
Team won't adopt
You're using it. Your team isn't. Without implementation and training, AI stays a solo experiment.
Why Claude for your business

Six reasons we pick Claude
for small business implementation.

01
Claude Projects changes everything
Persistent context, knowledge bases, per-project instructions — Claude Projects is the reason SMBs can build reliable, repeatable workflows. ChatGPT has no equivalent for this use case.
02
Decision-making clarity, not hedging
Claude gives you direct, useful output for business decisions. Less "on one hand, on the other" — more actionable insight you can actually use.
03
Consistency across sessions
With system prompts loaded, every Claude session starts with full context. Your team gets consistent output quality without recreating the wheel each time.
04
Better for writing-heavy businesses
Consulting, agencies, professional services, e-commerce — any business where writing quality matters. Claude produces cleaner, more natural business prose.
05
Team adoption is easier
Claude's interface and Projects structure make it easier for non-technical team members to understand, trust, and use consistently.
06
We implement it — not just recommend it
We build the workflows, configure the Projects, write the system prompts, and train your team. You get results, not another tool to figure out.
